## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / performance

## Changeset

- [ ] I have run `pnpm changeset` and added an appropriate changeset
      (skip only for docs/chore with no user-visible change)

## Testing

- [ ] New tests added / existing tests updated
- [ ] `pnpm run format:check` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm run test` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm run security` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm run build` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm run release:dry-run` passes locally

## Release / Publish Safety

- [ ] This PR does not publish packages, containers, marketplace artifacts, or registry metadata.
- [ ] This PR does not create manual tags or manual GitHub releases.
- [ ] Release changes use release-please manifest state only.
- [ ] Production publish remains guarded by GitHub Environments and explicit workflow approval.
